name: lego_fluctuation_engine_bookkeeping
classification_note: Finite trajectory/work bookkeeping lego for driven stochastic thermodynamics. It checks forward/reverse work distributions, Jarzynski-style exponential averages, and Crooks-style symmetry at a bounded operating point without claiming a full Carnot or Szilard engine theorem.

summary.scope_note: Bounded fluctuation bookkeeping over forward/reverse harmonic protocols. Use as a support lego for engine rows, not as a direct engine theorem.
